children.text: Click on select elements to open dropdown. Use arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close.

rects.text: Click on select elements to open dropdown. Use arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close.

children.text: Toggle checkboxes and radio buttons. Label text changes style when checked.

children.text: Click and hold the buttons. They should press down visually.

children.text: Click on inputs or Tab to them. Blue border and shadow appear on focus.

rects.text: Click on inputs or Tab to them. Blue border and shadow appear on focus.

children.text: on buttons - no dashed outline (mouse focus).

rects.text: on buttons - no dashed outline (mouse focus).

children.text: to buttons - orange dashed outline appears (keyboard focus).

rects.text: to buttons - orange dashed outline appears (keyboard focus).

children.text: When you focus the input inside, the entire container changes style.

children.text: Press Tab repeatedly. Focus should move through items in order. Shift+Tab goes backwards.

rects.text: Press Tab repeatedly. Focus should move through items in order. Shift+Tab goes backwards.

children.text: Disabled elements should appear grayed out and not respond to interaction.

rects.text: Disabled elements should appear grayed out and not respond to interaction.

children.text: These buttons combine multiple pseudo-states. Try hover + focus, click while hovering, Tab to see focus-visible.

rects.text: These buttons combine multiple pseudo-states. Try hover + focus, click while hovering, Tab to see focus-visible.
